items.desc_zh: 在当前的疫情爆发期间，由于错误信息和恐惧，卫生设施受到攻击。

items.title_en: Senate postpones confirmation hearing for intel chief after Trump's call to delay - NPR
items.title_zh: 在特朗普呼吁推迟后，参议院推迟了英特尔首席信息官的确认听证会 - NPR
items.desc_en: Senate postpones confirmation hearing for intel chief after Trump's call to delay  NPRTrump says intelligence chief pick’s hearing is off and Pulte will remain for now  The Washington PostTrump's DNI
items.desc_zh: 特朗普呼吁推迟 NPRT 后，参议院推迟了情报局长的确认听证会 特朗普称情报局长人选听证会已结束，普尔特将暂时留任 《华盛顿邮报》特朗普的国家情报总监

items.title_en: Snap unveils $2,195 smart glasses after previous flops
items.title_zh: Snap 继之前的失败后推出售价 2,195 美元的智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The augmented reality glasses from Snapchat's parent company are expected to ship in autumn.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 母公司的增强现实眼镜预计将于秋季发货。

items.title_en: Norway's crown princess undergoes successful lung transplant, palace says
items.title_zh: 挪威王储妃成功接受肺移植手术
items.desc_en: Crown Princess Mette-Marit, who suffered from pulmonary fibrosis, will now spend several weeks recovering in hospital.
items.desc_zh: 患有肺纤维化的王储妃梅特玛丽特现在将在医院康复数周。

items.title_en: Israel launches fresh strikes on Lebanon despite Trump criticism
items.title_zh: 尽管特朗普批评，以色列对黎巴嫩发动新的打击
items.desc_en: Speaking on Tuesday, Trump said Israel's PM Benjamin Netanyahu needed "to be more responsible with respect to Lebanon".
items.desc_zh: 特朗普周二表示，以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡需要“对黎巴嫩更加负责”。

items.title_en: Equatorial Guinea government resigns after failing to meet targets
items.title_zh: 赤道几内亚政府因未能实现目标而辞职
items.desc_en: The vice-president says the government had barely reached 10% of its targets, without specifying them.
items.desc_zh: 这位副总统表示，政府仅完成了目标的 10%，但没有具体说明。

items.title_en: Status quo at Jerusalem's holiest site under threat as Israeli nationalists flout rules
items.title_zh: 以色列民族主义者无视规则，耶路撒冷圣地的现状受到威胁
items.desc_en: Israeli nationalists are increasingly flouting a convention on how faiths share the al-Aqsa mosque compound.
items.desc_zh: 以色列民族主义者越来越多地蔑视关于信仰如何共享阿克萨清真寺大院的公约。

items.title_en: Group planned to attack White House UFC event using snipers and drones, FBI says
items.title_zh: FBI 称，该组织计划使用狙击手和无人机袭击白宫 UFC 赛事
items.desc_en: In newly unsealed court filings, the government says the group allegedly expressed grievances about corruption, the Epstein files, and data centres.
items.desc_zh: 在新公布的法庭文件中，政府表示，该组织据称对腐败、爱泼斯坦档案和数据中心表示不满。
